bottom_line:
BULLISH. MongoDB, Inc. (MDB) printed $0.63B in revenue in FY2025 Q4 (+18.7% YoY). Management credibility is strong (MCS 1.00, 3B/0H/0M record), supporting take-up of the forward guide. At 62.0x forward P/E, the stock trades at a 32% discount to peers (91.0x median) — the gap is either an opportunity or a warning, depending on whether the quality gap with peers is structural.

Technical regime is mixed: trend is intact above the 200-DMA ($321.49) but RSI 85 signals near-term overbought conditions — consider entry timing. Sell-side consensus PT of $300 implies -8.9% upside. The options market is pricing a ±5.9% move by the front-month expiry — consistent with historical realized vol. 30-day implied move is ±25.8%; 90-day is ±36.5%. Position-sizing should reflect conviction; use the trigger list to manage adds and trims around the next earnings catalyst.
